expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets the benchmark focus and ties it to Phase 4a requirements: “Benchmark focus: SDK/API visible outcomes (e.g., window title) must become explicit scenarios, not implied.” It also cites the Phase 4a contract requirement: “SDK/API visible outcomes must remain testable in scenario leaves, not hidden behind implementation wording.” While it notes no actual phase4a draft artifact is present, the output explicitly covers the focus at the contract/scenario-leaf requirement level.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as a Phase 4a contract check: “Primary phase under test: phase4a” and “Phase 4a Contract Check (What Phase 4a Must Do)”. It enumerates Phase 4a requirements (subcategory-only draft, scenario→atomic action chain→observable verification leaves) and states: “Output aligns with primary phase phase4a” with supporting reasoning tied to phase4a-contract.md and the defect replay mapping to Phase 4a.
